inputs.label: Required Strength
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of reference strength needed before loading

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of reference strength needed before loading
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yükleme öncesinde referans dayanımın yüzde olarak gereken oranı
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Referenzfestigkeit, der vor der Belastung benötigt wird
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de la résistance de référence nécessaire avant chargement
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de la resistencia de referencia necesario antes de la carga

inputs.label: Reference 28-Day Strength
inputs.businessContext: Concrete strength at 28 days under standard conditions

businessContext_i18n.en: Concrete strength at 28 days under standard conditions
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart koşullar altında 28 günde beton dayanımı
businessContext_i18n.fr: Résistance du béton à 28 jours dans des conditions standard
businessContext_i18n.es: Resistencia del concreto a 28 días bajo condiciones estándar

inputs.label: Temperature Factor
inputs.businessContext: Adjustment for ambient temperature (1.0 at 20°C, increase for colder)

businessContext_i18n.en: Adjustment for ambient temperature (1.0 at 20°C, increase for colder)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ortam sıcaklığı için düzeltme (20°C'de 1.0, soğukta artar)
businessContext_i18n.de: Anpassung für Umgebungstemperatur (1,0 bei 20°C, erhöhen bei Kälte)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ajustement pour la température ambiante (1,0 à 20 °C, augmenter pour les températures plus froides)
businessContext_i18n.es: Ajuste por temperatura ambiente (1.0 a 20°C, aumentar para temperaturas más frías)

inputs.label: Humidity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Adjustment for relative humidity (1.0 at 60% RH)

businessContext_i18n.en: Adjustment for relative humidity (1.0 at 60% RH)
businessContext_i18n.de: Anpassung für relative Luftfeuchtigkeit (1,0 bei 60% RH)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ajustement pour l'humidité relative (1,0 à 60 % HR)
businessContext_i18n.es: Ajuste por humedad relativa (1.0 a 60% HR)

businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur pour garantir une estimation prudente
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador para asegurar una estimación conservadora

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
